description: Write routes allowed outside the canonical Manifest dispatcher (/api/manifest/{entity}/commands/{command}). Two categories: (1) true infrastructure routes (webhooks, auth, cron, export, AI, integrations), (2) domain routes governed via executeManifestCommand through friendly API paths. All routes below either perform no domain mutation or already route through Manifest runtime.

rules.comment: Infrastructure: Inbound webhook handlers
Infrastructure: Third-party integrations (Goodshuffle, Nowsta, webhook management)
Infrastructure: Cron/scheduled job endpoints
Infrastructure: Manifest command dispatcher — single dynamic route dispatches to createManifestRuntime().runCommand()
Infrastructure: Sentry issue job processor + health check (no domain writes)
Infrastructure: Permanently exempted — settings, not domain command
Infrastructure: Conflict detection
Infrastructure: Mobile app endpoints (push tokens, notification prefs, app settings)
Infrastructure: Settings management (API keys, rate limits)
Infrastructure: Calendar sync (connect, disconnect, trigger, reschedule)
Domain routes governed via executeManifestCommand (ChartOfAccount, Invoice, Payment, CollectionCase, RevenueRecognition) + legacy direct-DB routes (payment-methods)
Domain routes governed via executeManifestCommand (AdminTask) + infrastructure (chat threads, trash restore)
Domain routes governed via executeManifestCommand (EventContract, EventGuest, EventBudget, EventReport, BattleBoard) + infrastructure (export, import, document parse, allergen check)
Domain routes governed via executeManifestCommand (Client, Venue, Proposal, CrmScoringRule) + infrastructure (scoring calculate)
Domain routes governed via executeManifestCommand (EmailTemplate, EmailWorkflow) + infrastructure (email/SMS send, webhooks, preferences)
Domain routes governed via executeManifestCommand (InventoryItem, CycleCountSession/Record, PurchaseOrder, AlertsConfig) + infrastructure (audit, batch, sync, export, import)
Domain routes governed via executeManifestCommand (PrepList, PrepListItem, KitchenTask, WasteEntry, Dish) + infrastructure (IoT, overrides, AI, composite recipes, import, nutrition, allergens)
Domain routes governed via executeManifestCommand (PayrollPeriod, EmployeeDeduction, PayrollApprovalHistory) + infrastructure (export, tax brackets, generate)
Domain routes governed via executeManifestCommand (PurchaseOrder receive/update-status) + infrastructure (approvals)
Domain routes governed via executeManifestCommand (Shipment, ShipmentItem) + infrastructure (status transitions)
Domain routes governed via executeManifestCommand (CommandBoard, CommandBoardLayout) + infrastructure (simulations, templates)

Domain routes governed via executeManifestCommand (ScheduleShift, EmployeeAvailability, EmployeeCertification, TimeOffRequest, LaborBudget, BudgetAlert, User) + infrastructure (bulk-assignment, optimize, predict)
Domain routes governed via executeManifestCommand (TimeEntry) + infrastructure (bulk operations)
Domain routes governed via executeManifestCommand (TrainingModule, TrainingAssignment) + infrastructure (complete)
Domain routes governed via createManifestRuntime (User deactivate, update-role)
Domain route: Event intake lead submission
Infrastructure: Sales report generation
Infrastructure: AI Bulk Task Generation — propose + confirm tasks via GPT-4o-mini
Infrastructure: AI Event Setup NL parsing and session management
Domain routes governed via executeManifestCommand (EmailTemplate commands, SmsAutomationRule)
Domain route: SMS automation rule activate/deactivate
Infrastructure: Staffing recommendations
Infrastructure: Role policy grant/revoke/update
Infrastructure: Menu story generation
Infrastructure: Vercel log ingestion webhook
Infrastructure: Public contract signing with rate limiting
Infrastructure: Public proposal response with rate limiting
